phase_b0_key_improvements.title: Integrate Z3 theory plugins end-to-end and fix CEGAR
phase_b0_key_improvements.description: Wire StrideTheory reshape validation into the BoundedModelChecker's Z3 encoding. Validate that quality-filtered CEGAR prevents the F1 degradation (run ablation: no-CEGAR vs unfiltered-CEGAR vs quality-filtered-CEGAR). The BroadcastTheoryPlugin is already integrated but its impact needs quantification.
phase_b0_key_improvements.estimated_changes: 500-1000 lines of source code changes + experiment scripts

phase_b0_key_improvements.title: Accurate paper positioning and meaningful baselines
phase_b0_key_improvements.description: Reposition paper as 'constraint-based verification of nn.Module computation graphs' (not BMC/CEGAR/Craig interpolation). Run head-to-head comparison with a syntactic pattern-matching baseline (to show Z3 theory integration adds value) and a strong LLM baseline. Add bootstrap confidence intervals to all metrics.
phase_b0_key_improvements.estimated_changes: Full paper rewrite + new experiment scripts

phase_b0_key_improvements.title: Reduce false positives via path-sensitive guards and better stdlib models
phase_b0_key_improvements.description: The 34% stdlib TP rate is primarily caused by path-insensitive analysis and incomplete stdlib models. Improve the guard harvester to be path-sensitive for shape-relevant branches, and add stdlib stubs for common torch/numpy operations. Categorize false positive root causes.

success_criteria.cegar_ablation: Quality-filtered CEGAR F1 >= no-CEGAR F1 (no degradation)
success_criteria.theory_integration: BroadcastPropagator and reshape constraints exercised in Z3 queries during verification
success_criteria.baselines: At least 2 meaningful baselines compared head-to-head
success_criteria.false_positive_reduction: Categorize all false positives by root cause, reduce stdlib FP rate
success_criteria.paper_accuracy: No mispositioning (no false BMC/Craig interpolation claims)

results.device_theory: F1 0.000 → 1.000 (enhanced DevicePatternChecker with forward() tensor factory detection, plain lists)

results.terminology: Paper updated: Craig interpolation → unsat-core extraction, BMC → constraint verification, CEGAR → Houdini-style predicate accumulation
results.baselines: TensorGuard F1=0.876 beats GPT-4.1-nano F1=0.815 and Syntactic F1=0.404

results.false_positive_root_cause: Conv2d missing padding/stride/dilation extraction caused 7 vision FPs and 2 reshape FPs
results.remaining_fps: 4 FPs remain (2 benchmark labeling issues, 1 dilation edge case, 1 chain)
results.intent_integration: OverwarnAnalyzer integrated into expanded eval for device/phase/gradient detection
